content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Accepted amendment fr-11-e98a2d5f. Verified that `br list` defaults to 50 results and excludes closed/deferred issues, confirming the bug in bead summary hydration.

## Votes

- `fr-11-e98a2d5f`: Accept
  Verified directly: `br list --help` shows `--limit` defaults to 50 and `--all`/`--deferred` are opt-in. `BrCommand::list()` at br_process.rs:168-170 invokes bare `br list --json` with none of these flags. `load_bead_summaries()` at project.rs:766-780 feeds the resulting capped set into `build_planned_elsewhere_context()`, which performs `bead_summaries.get()` lookups at lines 1399 and 1474 for related beads (adjacent, shared-acceptance, upstream, downstream). When a related bead is closed, deferred, or beyond the 50-result page, `prompt_bead_status()` falls through to `"unknown"` (line 1221) and title enrichment degrades to the bead ID. This is a real correctness defect — prompts that claim to be self-contained can silently lose metadata for valid related beads, potentially mis-scoping downstream work. The fix (exhaustive fetch or targeted ID query) and regression test requirement are both appropriate.
